name: Worm Warlord
name_jp: ワーム・ウォーロード
desc: This card cannot be Special Summoned. Negate the effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by battle with this card. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.
mnst_eff: This card cannot be Special Summoned. Negate the effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by battle with this card. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.
eff: This card cannot be Special Summoned. Negate the effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by battle with this card. If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal - Dragunity of the Hurricane!!
Duel Terminal Chronicle 2 - Chapter of Chaos

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
